channel.title: Videos on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Videos on Arrans github.io

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: IliasHad/edit-mind
item.description: Local-first AI video intelligence platform. Index your video library with multi-modal analysis (YOLO, DeepFace, Whisper), search semantically via natural language, Docker-ready.
